description: Row 0 - observation does not sit on/after any measurement break.
Senior High (Grades 11-12) phased 2012-2016; the secondary-enrolment step-change is reform-driven, not organic growth (A-009).
NAT scale/methodology change ~2015-2016; MPS not comparable across the break (e.g., Grade 6 70.88 in 2015 to 42.03 in 2016) (A-004).
Pandemic school closures and labour disruption distort 2020-2021 figures independent of any administration (A-010).
Philippines first sat PISA in 2018; only 2018 and 2022 exist - discrete anchors, never interpolated (A-003).
